prompt: Eye-level interior photograph of a finished board-and-batten accent wall in a Massachusetts home mudroom, painted a deep mid-tone navy blue. Vertical wood battens at clean even spacing meet a horizontal cap rail at picture-frame height. Below the cap rail, a built-in oak bench with three iron coat hooks above it. A folded canvas drop cloth on the bench, a coiled extension cord beside it. Wide-plank pine floor below, lightly satin-finished. Shot with a 35mm prime lens, soft morning daylight from a small side window casting gentle directional shadow across the batten profiles. Slightly desaturated photography, brand red on a small Stanley tape measure resting on the bench as the only fully saturated color. High-contrast working-contractor catalog feel. NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury staged. No people, no readable text, no logos.
